page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.240xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by Intel Xeon 8490H processors. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 960 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, operating at a base clock speed of 1.9 GHz. It is equipped with 16,384.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 17.07 GB per core.

The instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. A key hardware tradeoff is the 1.9 GHz CPU clock speed and the lack of hyperthreading, which prioritizes single-threaded execution predictability over multi-threaded density per core. There are no integrated GPUs.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.re8.240xlarge represents an ultra-high-density resource profile designed to consolidate massive workloads that would otherwise require multi-node clusters. This consolidation reduces network latency overhead between nodes. The hardware configuration is optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, massive enterprise resource planning systems, real-time data analytics, and memory-intensive scientific computing workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.240xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with Intel Xeon 8490H processors operating at 1.9 GHz, delivering 960 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core. The instance features an exceptionally large memory capacity of 16,384.0 GB, resulting in a resource density of 17.07 GB of RAM per core. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 200 Gbps. However, the instance lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for massive consolidation of memory-intensive workloads, making it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines that require substantial memory capacity without the overhead of multi-node clustering.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.240xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 960 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores, 16,384 GB of RAM, and 200 Gbps network bandwidth for massive in-memory workloads.

tagline: An ultra-high-density memory-optimized instance featuring nine hundred sixty dedicated physical cores and sixteen terabytes of system RAM.
bullet_points: 960 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8490H cores at 1.9 GHz
16,384 GB of system memory providing 17.07 GB per core
200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput transfers
No local storage or integrated GPUs included
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERPs
